---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Propose a new feature, canvas shape library, or administrative UI improvement.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when I try to..."

### Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Add any architectural ideas or visual wireframes if possible.

### Describe Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

### Enterprise / Team Use Case
Explain how this feature benefits collaborative teams or enterprise organizational administrative controls.
